description_long: This is an oval wooden table with a plank-style tabletop, featuring a natural wood grain finish. The tabletop is supported by four elegantly curved metal legs, which are painted in a light gray color and add a decorative touch to the otherwise simple design. The table's surface appears smooth and well-finished, suitable for dining, meetings, or outdoor gatherings. The legs are attached at the corners, providing stability and a classic silhouette. There are no visible drawers, shelves, or additional features, emphasizing a minimalist yet stylish appearance. The combination of wood and metal materials makes it versatile for both urban parks and indoor communal spaces.
description: An oval wooden table with a smooth plank-style top and four curved gray metal legs, blending rustic and modern aesthetics.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full oval tabletop and all four curved metal legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the table's narrow profile and the curvature of the two visible legs.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, displaying the tabletop and all four legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the tabletop's edge and two legs.
